name: @inho-team/qe-framework
description: Query Execute Framework for Claude Code — SIVS loop, folder-aware context memory, 167 skills and 21 agents

scripts.postinstall: sh -c 'cd / && node --input-type=module -e "try { const p = process.env.npm_package_json; const { installClaudeAssets } = await import(new URL(\"./scripts/lib/client_installers.mjs\", \"file://\" + p)); installClaudeAssets(); } catch (err) { console.warn(\"[qe-framework] postinstall skipped:\", err?.message || err); console.warn(\"[qe-framework] Run qe-framework-install manually after installation.\"); }"'
scripts.preuninstall: sh -c 'cd / && node --input-type=module -e "try { const p = process.env.npm_package_json; const { uninstallClaudeAssets } = await import(new URL(\"./scripts/lib/client_installers.mjs\", \"file://\" + p)); uninstallClaudeAssets(); } catch (err) { console.warn(\"[qe-framework] preuninstall skipped:\", err?.message || err); }"'
